ValidationRule.description: Data Solutions are not allowed to change NDA fields
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), (Record_Type_Name__c = 'Data Solution Request'), ($UserRole.DeveloperName = 'DataClientReporting'), OR(ISCHANGED ( NDA_signed__c ), ISCHANGED ( NDA__c))
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Users with the Client Reporting Role cannot modify NDA fields
